Footer.tagline: AInevoie connects customers with trusted local service providers — simple, fast and transparent from first request through booking, payment and feedback.

Hero.subtitle: Find services or take bookings — in one app.

Hero.dialogBody: Be among the first to know when the app goes live. No spam — only the updates that matter.

Features.title: Everything you need to book a service or run your business
Features.subtitle: AInevoie keeps it simple: request, schedule, pay and leave a review.
Features.i1d: Filter by category, area and reviews — make a confident choice without the back-and-forth.
Features.i2d: Pick a slot that suits you; the provider confirms or suggests another time in no time.
Features.i3d: Pay securely in a few taps. Both sides can see payment status and a full history of jobs.
Features.i4d: Chat in the app and stay on top of requests, confirmations and updates.
Features.i5d: Providers showcase services, rates and coverage. Customers see genuine reviews.
Features.i6d: After the job, leave a review — it raises standards and makes the next search easier for everyone.

About.clientTitle: Find the right service without the runaround
About.clientLead: No more guesswork. See who is available near you, compare options and book when it suits you.
About.clientS1d: Rates, reviews, availability and details upfront — so you can decide in minutes.
About.clientS2d: Pick the date and time, get confirmation and keep your full booking history in one place.
About.mockupClientAlt: Customer view: provider profile and booking
About.providerTitle: Turn enquiries into confirmed jobs — quickly and without fuss
About.providerLead: Build your profile, list your services and receive requests with the details you need: location, time window and brief. Confirm in a tap and keep your diary organised.

WorkProcess.title: How AInevoie works in three steps
WorkProcess.subtitle: Effortless for customers. Efficient for providers.
WorkProcess.s1d: Choose a category, describe the job and add location plus your preferred time window.
WorkProcess.s2d: Browse available providers, pick the best fit and lock in your booking.
WorkProcess.s3d: Pay in the app when available, then share how it went — real feedback keeps the marketplace honest.

Screens.title: Looks sharp. Feels effortless.
Screens.subtitle: From discovery and booking to payment and reviews — every screen is built to feel obvious.
Screens.alt7: In-app chat between customer and provider

Cta.title: Get AInevoie and get more done
Cta.subtitle: Whether you hire services or offer them, the app helps you connect, schedule and finish jobs with less friction.

Testimonials.title: What people are saying
Testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from the AInevoie community.
Testimonials.t1: I found a tradesperson who could come the same day. Booking took seconds and everything was clear from the start.
Testimonials.t2: Requests are organised and the phone barely rings. I confirm jobs in the app and keep a clean paper trail.
Testimonials.t3: Seeing reviews and prices up front made all the difference — I chose quickly and saved a lot of time.
Testimonials.t4: My profile looks professional and clients arrive with clear briefs. That alone is worth it.

Contact.title: Questions? We reply quickly.
Contact.subtitle: Tell us whether you are a customer or a provider and what you need — we will get back to you as soon as we can.
Contact.consent: By sending this message you agree we may contact you about your enquiry. We will not send marketing spam.

Pricing.title: Straightforward plans. No surprises.
Pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that matches how you use the app. You can switch any time.

Start.description: Ideal for trying the platform or light, occasional use.
Start.b0: Profile and service setup (providers) / standard customer account

Standard.description: For regular use when you want traction you can see.
Standard.b2: Higher placement in search where applicable
Standard.b3: Faster confirmations and simpler job management • Priority support

Pro.description: For teams that need scale and tighter control.
Pro.b1: More locations or areas (where the product supports it)
Pro.b2: Reporting and analytics (where the product supports it)
Pro.b3: Extended branding (where the product supports it) • Dedicated support

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.subtitle: Straight answers so you can get started with confidence.
Faq.q1t: Is AInevoie for customers or businesses?
Faq.q1d: Both. Customers discover services and book; providers receive enquiries and run their workload from the app.
Faq.q2t: How do I pick the right provider?
Faq.q2d: Compare reviews, services, rates and availability — then choose whoever fits your priorities.
Faq.q3t: How do I send a request as a customer?
Faq.q3d: Choose a category, describe the job, set location and time window, then select an available provider.
Faq.q4t: Which cities is the app in?
Faq.q4d: We are rolling out in stages. Join the launch list and we will tell you the moment we open in your area.
Faq.q5d: Yes. Change or cancel in the app and the provider is notified automatically. Some features may arrive in phases (coming soon).
Faq.q6d: Where in-app payment is enabled at launch, you pay inside the app and can track status and history for every job.
Faq.q7t: What if I prefer not to pay in the app?
Faq.q7d: We will confirm the options available at launch. The aim is always clarity and fairness for customers and providers.
Faq.q8d: Providers sign up and complete their profiles. Depending on the category, we may add extra checks.
Faq.q9t: How do I join as a provider?
Faq.q9d: Create an account, add your services, area and availability — then you are ready to receive enquiries.
Faq.q10d: Plans are mainly aimed at providers, scaled to volume and needs. Browsing and booking as a customer is free.
Faq.q11d: After the visit, the customer can rate the job. Reviews help everyone spot reliable providers.
Faq.q12d: Use the contact form — we will come back to you as soon as we can.

Docs.metaDescription: A short guide to AInevoie for customers and for cleaning businesses.
Docs.introP1: AInevoie matches demand with supply in one place: customers find a cleaning company that fits, and providers receive relevant enquiries and manage bookings with less admin.
Docs.introP2: In the app you can search and filter businesses, read profiles and reviews, send requests, schedule visits and, where available, pay securely without leaving the app.
Docs.postNotFoundMetaDescription: This guide does not exist or is no longer available.

Blog.localeNote: Posts stay in the language they were published in. Our current articles are in Romanian.
Blog.sectionSubtitle: Practical ideas on cleaning, staying organised and choosing the right service — at home or at work.

ProviderIntro.subtitle: Create your account, add the essentials and follow the guided setup. Your details are saved to your profile and carry through to the mobile app.
ProviderIntro.metaLine: About 2 minutes • Your data is protected • Email confirmation
ProviderIntro.phoneAlt: Provider calendar in the AInevoie app
ProviderIntro.valueTitle: What you need to work efficiently as a provider
ProviderIntro.valueSubtitle: AInevoie brings signup and day-to-day job management into one smooth flow.
ProviderIntro.v1d: Your profile appears where customers are searching.
ProviderIntro.v2d: Enquiries arrive with the essentials already filled in.
ProviderIntro.v3d: Plan work with fewer last-minute questions.
ProviderIntro.v4d: Verified details help your profile stand out.
ProviderIntro.v5d: Onboarding is quick — no endless forms.
ProviderIntro.v6d: We will reach out if we need anything else to finish your setup.
ProviderIntro.finalTitle: Ready to join the AInevoie network?
ProviderIntro.finalSubtitle: Complete the form now — registration takes just a few minutes.
ProviderIntro.flowSubtitle: Three straightforward steps before you go live.
ProviderIntro.flowS1d: Add contact information and the services you offer.
ProviderIntro.flowS2d: After you submit, we email you to confirm and outline the next steps.
ProviderIntro.flowS3d: The AInevoie team checks your submission and contacts you if anything is missing.
ProviderIntro.afterSignup1: Your account is created and your details are on file.
ProviderIntro.afterSignup2: You receive a welcome email with next steps.
ProviderIntro.afterSignup3: We review your profile and get in touch if we need anything else.

ProviderSuccess.title: Your provider account is ready
ProviderSuccess.intro: Your details are on file with AInevoie. We will review your profile and be in touch if we need anything else.
ProviderSuccess.s1d: You should have a welcome message. If it is not in your inbox, check Spam or Promotions.
ProviderSuccess.s2d: We go through the profile you sent. If something is missing, we will contact you promptly by email or phone.
ProviderSuccess.s3d: The account you create today stays active and will work in the mobile app from day one of launch.
ProviderSuccess.helpBefore: Questions about sole traders, limited companies, paperwork or getting set up? Email us at
